series_metadata.series_description: Series contains originals of 1199 and SCOPE/OEA (State Council of Professional Educators/Ohio Educators Association) employee applications for tuition reimbursement. Copies of course material needed, copies of proof of payment and book receipts, copies of attendance and/or grades, copies of all correspondence between agency and employee, also copy of payment voucher.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep in office for five years plus current year, then destroy provided audit is complete and audit reports released and all State Wide Cost Allocation Program (SWCAP) obligations have been met ; Electronic: Keep in office for five years plus current year, then destroy provided audit is complete and audit reports released and all State Wide Cost Allocation Program (SWCAP) obligations have been met, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
